content: Kubernetes optimistic concurrency: every object write is checked against resourceVersion; concurrent writers get a 409 Conflict. Operators must retry-on-conflict (client-go's retry.RetryOnConflict or re-fetch+patch) rather than treating conflict as a hard error. Ahmet Alp Balkan's controller-pitfalls piece adds: watch for 'unnecessary API calls during reconciliation' (re-writing status/spec when nothing changed) and the 'expectations pattern' gap — reading from a stale informer cache immediately after a write can cause duplicate actions/races.
